name: Common Standards
description: Applies avogt-sundn/common-standards formatting config on every container rebuild. Set freeze to a reason string to opt out.

version.description: Branch or tag of avogt-sundn/common-standards to pin (e.g. 'main', 'v1.2.0')

categories.description: Comma-separated list of config sets to apply: universal, java, frontend, vscode

freeze.description: Set to a reason string to suppress auto-updates (e.g. 'legacy formatter, tracked in PROJ-441'). Empty = auto-update on every rebuild.
